# BEBrowserDataImportManager

**Class**

A class that handles importing browsing data from other browsers.

## Declaration

```swift
class BEBrowserDataImportManager
```

## Overview

This class coordinates the transfer of browsing data by presenting the framework-provided import sheet when a person wants to import data through your app’s UI (see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/requestImport(for:completionHandler:)]). Call this class’s [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/requestImport(for:completionHandler:)] to stream browsing data from the system, as received through another browser. For more information, see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/transferring-browsing-data-to-another-browser].

## Creating an import manager

- **init()**: Initializes an import manager.

## Importing browser data

- **importBrowserData(token:)**: Imports another app’s browsing data as a stream.
- **requestImport(for:completionHandler:)**: Requests that the system display the sheet to import data from another browser.

## Managing import tokens

- **importTokenUserInfoKey**: A key for accessing the data transfer token in the import launch activity’s info dictionary.
- **importTokenUserInfoKey**: A key for accessing the data transfer token in the import launch activity’s info dictionary.
- **userActivityType**: A constant that identifies the launch activity for data import requests.
- **userActivityType**: A constant that identifies the launch activity for data import requests.

## Initializers

- **init(scene:)**: Initializes an import manager for a window scene.

## Data import management

- **BEImportMetadata**: Metadata that describes import capabilities for browser data transfers.
- **BEImportOptions**: Options for importing browsing data.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
